name: gosx
description: A Go-native server-first web platform. Author components in native GSX syntax, render on the server by default, hydrate interactive islands with WebAssembly.

scripts.test:js: node client/js/build-bootstrap.mjs --check && node --test client/js/bootstrap-size.test.mjs client/js/06-declarative-actions.test.mjs client/js/07-declarative-regions.test.mjs client/js/runtime.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: node --test e2e/gosx_docs_e2e.test.mjs e2e/webgpu_honesty_gate_e2e.test.mjs e2e/motion-spin.test.mjs e2e/motion-material.test.mjs e2e/water_demo_e2e.test.mjs
